Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: steam power plants [300000431], power plants (complexes) [300000414], industrial complexes [300000385], complexes by function [300000203], complexes (buildings and sites) [300000202], Built Complexes and Districts (hierarchy name) [300000201], Built Environment (hierarchy name) [300264550], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Facilities that create and distribute power obtained from nuclear reactors, which initiate and control a self-sustaining series of nuclear fissions.
自核反應爐產生並且輸送能量的設備，核反應爐能啟動並控制自發持續的一連串核分裂。
Einrichtung, die Strom mittels eines Kernreaktors erzeugt und diesen verteilt; zur Stromerzeugung wird eine kontrollierte, sich selbst erhaltende Reihe von Kernspaltungen genutzt.

Source.Source_ID: 2000039651/Canadian Thesaurus of Construction Science and Technology (1978)
